title: melica fugax
intro: Melica fugax, also known as poverty grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Melica fugax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function. Melica fugax can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
